acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding refine.ts
Refinement loop implements the docs/04 pseudocode with correct ring sequencing, fix dispatch, convergence tracking, and three termination conditions
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) refine.ts exports refine(document, level, config) that implements a while loop with max_iterations guard. (2) Each iteration runs Ring 0 (direct call to per-level validator), then Ring 1 (via ring1 runner) only if Ring 0 passes, then Ring 2 (via ring2 runner) only if Ring 1 passes — strict sequential gating per REQ-01. (3) On Ring 0 failure: calls fixStructural, then restarts from Ring 0. (4) On Ring 1 failure: tracks previous_ring1_issues, calls checkConvergence against previous iteration, escalates if converged, otherwise calls fixSemantic and restarts from Ring 0. (5) On Ring 2 failure: tracks previous_ring2_issues, calls checkConvergence, escalates if converged, otherwise calls fixQuality and restarts from Ring 0. (6) Three termination paths: all rings pass returns { promoted: true }, convergence detected returns { escalated: true, report }, max iterations returns { escalated: true, report }. (7) previous_ring1_issues and previous_ring2_issues are maintained as local variables, tracked separately per ring. PASS if all seven hold; FAIL if any is missing.
